Final Fusion Deck

I always wanted a Sky Striker deck, and in a very rare based move from Konami (very rare Konami W) they release Legendary Modern Decks. The Sky Striker deck is ready to play (not at meta level, but playable). I added the Ash, Impermanence, TTT, Droplets, Mulcharmys and non Sky Striker extra monsters. As usual, Raigeki, Monster Reborn and Harpies Duster are my personal meme staples. Maybe next month i will buy another set for the thisrd Kagari, second Zero, the third Mulcharmys and a second field.
